calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-09-2019 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES:
Vivian Lerche, Esq., specially appearing for the plaintiff. At the request of plaintiff's counsel, the Court ordered the case dismissed without prejudice. Judge: GARRETT L. WONG; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-06-2019 Continued To May-07-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. Plaintiff's counsel is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order To Show Cause is re-set to May-07-2019 at 10:30am in Department 610. Judge: GARRETT L. WONG; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported.
